issues.title: Key agreement example uses non-existent getter methods
issues.problem: The documentation uses incorrect method names getSponsorPubKey() and getSponsorTmpPubKey() for KeyAgreementResult. The actual method names are getPublicKey() and getTmpPublicKey(). Code copied from this documentation will fail to compile.

issues.title: Tests renamed to *Test pattern run without SDF device
issues.problem: Renaming SM3Example.java to SM3ExampleTest.java (and similarly for SM2ExampleTest.java and SM4ExampleTest.java) causes mvn test to execute them automatically. But setUp() unconditionally loads the vendor library and opens a device. On machines without a configured SDF library/device, the examples module fails instead of skipping gracefully.

issues.title: Quick-start library configuration uses incorrect property names
issues.problem: The documentation shows incorrect configuration for loading the SDF library: (1) Shows using a full .so path with -Dsdf4j.library.path, but the loader requires both library.name AND library.path as separate values; (2) Shows library.search.paths which the implementation never reads. Following these examples will result in UnsatisfiedLinkError.
issues.code:
#### 方式一：Java系统属性
java -Dsdf4j.library.path=/usr/lib/libsdfx.so -jar your-app.jar

#### 方式二：配置文件
library.name=sdfx
library.search.paths=/usr/lib:/usr/local/lib

#### 方式三：环境变量
export SDF_LIBRARY_PATH=/usr/lib/libsdfx.so
issues.fix:
#### 方式一：Java系统属性
java -Dsdf4j.library.name=sdfx -Dsdf4j.library.path=/usr/lib -jar your-app.jar

#### 方式二：配置文件
library.name=sdfx
library.path=/usr/lib

#### 方式三：环境变量
export SDF_LIBRARY_NAME=sdfx
export SDF_LIBRARY_PATH=/usr/lib

issues.title: Capability detector example uses wrong lambda type
issues.problem: The block lambdas in checkFunction() calls do not return values, so overload resolution picks checkFunction(Runnable) instead of checkFunction(Callable<?>). But Runnable.run() cannot throw SDFException, making the example uncompilable.

issues.title: tearDown releases KEK access even when setUp never acquired it
issues.problem: JUnit runs @After even when @Before fails. If SDF_GetKEKAccessRight() or SDF_GenerateKeyWithKEK() throws during setUp(), sessionHandle is non-zero but no KEK access right was granted. tearDown() then calls SDF_ReleaseKEKAccessRight() unconditionally and can replace the original setup failure with a secondary cleanup error.

issues.title: Missing validation in HybridSignature.setL()
issues.problem: The setL() method does not validate that the input value is non-negative or consistent with sigM.length. Similar methods in ECCCipher.setL() and HybridCipher.setL1() perform this validation to prevent invalid state.

issues.title: Capability detector calls SDF_GenerateAgreementDataWithECC with wrong number of arguments
issues.problem: SDF_GenerateAgreementDataWithECC takes 4 arguments (sessionHandle, keyIndex, keyBits, sponsorID), but the guide calls it with 6 arguments. Anyone copying the sample gets a compile error.

issues.title: Javadoc generation failures are ignored
issues.problem: The mvn javadoc:javadoc step is not checked for failure (no || exit 1). If Javadoc generation breaks, the script still prints "SDF4J built successfully." and exits with success status.
issues.code:
mvn clean package \
    -Dsdf.library.name=$SDFX_LIB_NAME \
    -Dsdf.library.path=$SDFX_BUILD_DIR || exit 1
mvn javadoc:javadoc -pl sdf4j
echo "SDF4J built successfully."
issues.fix:
mvn clean package \
    -Dsdf.library.name=$SDFX_LIB_NAME \
    -Dsdf.library.path=$SDFX_BUILD_DIR || exit 1
mvn javadoc:javadoc -pl sdf4j || exit 1
echo "SDF4J built successfully."
